title: Mystic Gems
description: Unleash the power of rare mystical gems, each with unique abilities and risks - Transform your gameplay!
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7282f68d1658eea00ac51e17e5d229a95549e2_0.webp)

## Unleash Unique Powers 
Dive into the power of **7 unique mystical gems**—Life, Strength, Speed, Poison, Unstable Power, Shadow, and Cursed Resistance—each designed to transform your Minecraft experience. 
With **distinct abilities**, these gems grant powerful boons, from healing to enhanced speed and strength, but some come with challenging drawbacks to balance their might.

![gems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3919a392d9223c3367dd61930c27c8f5f4613c4.png)

## Limited Uses and Strategic Durations
**Each gem offers up to 10 uses**, with its own duration and cooldown period, requiring strategic use for maximum effect.

## Risk and Reward
Some gems carry a risk; wielding them may expose you to **negative effects**, making each activation a calculated decision.

## Crafting Recipes
Crafting is simple: **recipes for each gem are visible in the crafting table** and demand valuable resources, reflecting the rarity of each artifact.

![craft1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8ca66099ab8a6050670de284c4572816a6dc035.png)![craft2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76914398cbf990fc9318ce6e22021b17c00988b6.png)
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9468e580dd920d5de43cf27e3e7baca256020f4c.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a85efbf75b2a6a25716e7268bcc3c6a8c66b6177.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3124646fc0b22796b2e4d5e12d81866a69d9e7e0.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074eb0e63d069c165fe0d6de1e79c59c1a951558.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1ed1dca7c5bc8a97f75a8ab0be60dd67970a87a.png)

## Uninstalling
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
`
/function mystic_gems:uninstall
`

## Need Help or Support?
